steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The student needs to contrast the subject matter of the two prints—what each work depicts or expresses as its theme—not how they were made or when.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'The print by Méndez is a black-and white linocut; by contrast, Muafangejo's is a relief print.': Contrasts printmaking technique, not subject matter. ✗
  • Choice B — 'The scenes depicted in both works were first carved onto a printing block, then stamped onto paper, however, one work is a linocut, while the other is a relief print.': Also focuses on technique and production method. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Méndez made La Protesta ("The Protest") in 1937, while Muafangejo made The Love Is Approaching later, in 1974.': Contrasts dates of creation, not subject matter. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Méndez's print expresses an explicitly political point of view, while Muafangejo's depicts a tranquil, everyday scene.': Directly contrasts what each print is about—political expression versus an everyday scene. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
